news.title: Netflix unveils first look at ‘A Different World’ sequel series shot in Atlanta
news.summary: Get ready to go back to Hillman College as Netflix reveals the first look at “A Different World” sequel series.

news.title: Operation Red Card targets human trafficking during World Cup Atlanta
news.summary: Federal, state, and local law enforcement agencies will announce the outcomes of Operation Red Card, a coordinated initiative targeting human trafficking and child exploitation, during a Tuesday brief

news.title: Man charged with murder after 30-year-old found stabbed to death in DeKalb County front yard
news.summary: DeKalb County Police said a man is in custody in the stabbing death of 30-year-old Kenyon Jefferies, which occurred on July 3.

news.title: 2 suspects arrested, 1 wanted after hotel car break-ins ends with chase on I-20
news.summary: Conyers officers are investigating over a dozen car break-ins at three hotels.

news.title: 2 arrested, 1 at large after Conyers police chase ends in I-20 crash
news.summary: Police are searching for a runaway suspect after an I-20 pursuit linked to a string of early morning hotel car break-ins ended in a collision with an officer's cruiser on Tuesday.

news.title: DeKalb County police find woman dead, suspect injured after early morning shooting
news.summary: A woman was found dead from a gunshot wound in DeKalb County, and a suspect was detained nearby, police report. The investigation is ongoing.

news.title: DeKalb County deputy arrested, fired after investigation into misuse of license plate camera system
news.summary: "The misuse of law enforcement technology or confidential information for any unauthorized purpose is a serious breach of the public's trust," the sheriff said.

news.title: Ex-Georgia officer sentenced in deadly hit-and-run
news.summary: Godreque Ravetto Newsom Sr. is going to prison for the deadly hit-and-run on I-85 near 17th Street NW in 2024

news.title: Sandy Springs Police release video of arrest as suspect car slammed onto windshield of officer's cruiser
news.summary: Sandy Springs PD said on Facebook the incident occurred with a suspect wanted on drug charges and "ties to a larger criminal organization."
